details.test: Task 1: Book 60-min online couples session under $120 in early evening within 7 days
Task 2: Register for free online parenting teens communication webinar within 30 days
Task 3: Create weekly family schedule with 3 activities and save
Task 4: Complete couples communication assessment and save 2 recommended articles
Task 5: Save 3 short sibling conflict articles (<10 min) to reading list
Task 6: Choose better-value premarital program under $300 and start enrollment
Task 7: Create custom anger management learning path with video, article, and exercise
Task 8 (adapted): Schedule weekend evening session with counselor via phone_call
Task 9 (adapted): Add 4-week online premarital program to cart and apply FAMILY10 discount
